functions.title: Guide Book #19
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #19§r
§lFlying Book§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Construct, Object, Magical, Aerial.
•§lSummon by§r: Book Curserer
•§lHealth§r: 8
•§lFly speed§r: 0.1

•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lTempted by§r: Book and Quill
•§lPossible drops§r: Book, XP Orbs.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 1
•Can be sealed by using a Sealing Bookmark.
•Can duplicate a magic books by interacting with quills.

•Can duplicate a magic books by interacting with quills.
•Can be cursed by the Book Curserer.

§lDescription§r:
 
§‘Flying Books flutter through the air with quiet curiosity — or quiet menace, depending on their enchantments. Though small and fragile, they carry strange magical properties and can even replicate magical tomes when
near enchanted quills. Best not to leave your library unattended.§’
